# Vendored Well-Known Types

The `google/protobuf/*.proto` files in this tree are copied from
[protocolbuffers/protobuf](https://github.com/protocolbuffers/protobuf) (BSD license)
so `make proto` works without a system-wide Protobuf `include` directory.

Source revision: **v25.3** (`timestamp.proto`, `duration.proto`).

To refresh after a protobuf upgrade, replace these files from the same release tag.
